title: Vicloon Baby Hand and Footprint Kit, Baby Handprint and Footprint Ink Kit Pet Paw Print Kit with 3 Ink Pads and 6 Imprint Cards, Inkless Print Kit Paw Print Kits for Dogs (Pink)
features: 🐾【High Quality Material】: The ink pad uses enhanced ink, and the ink pad has strong ink absorption, which can maintain the gloss and durability of printing. Baby Hands and Footprints Kit comes with 3 touch stamp pads, 6 white stamping cards. This ink-free pad ensures no marks will be left on your baby's little hands or cute little feet.

🐾【Easy to Use】: Please place the paw print kit on the print and gently press the plastic-covered back with your baby's hands and feet by positioning them. Within seconds, lift your baby's hand and baby footprint kit away from the print, then let the printed paper dry for an hour.

🐾【Gift for Baptism】: Baby handprint and footprint ink kit helps you make cute hand and footprint masterpieces to create memories for your baby's hands and feet. Makes a great Mother's Day gift, baby shower gift or gift for new parents or grandparents.

🐾【Pet Paw Prints】: If collecting animal paw prints, please clean the paws and cut the hair short, otherwise the paw prints will be blurred. The inkless printing pad can also be used to leave paw prints for your adorable pets, making a great gift for animal lovers to create wonderful memories.

🐾【Create Perfect Memories】: The baby hand and footprints kit is specially designed to capture baby's footprints regularly in a baby book to track his/her growth, or even as a gift to friends, family or colleagues to help them preserve your baby's childhood.
description: Product Description Makes A Wonderful Family Gift With This Baby Foot Or Hand Print Kit, You Can Keep Your Baby's Adorable Hand Prints And Footprints As A Lifetime Keepsake. DIY Project It makes a fun and easy DIY project You can leave your baby's footprints and handprints on the card and create wonderful moments. You can also leave your pet's paw prints on it, it's your family too. Photo Banner With Characteristic Print Print cards * 6 Touch Pad * 3 Souvenir gift Kiss Their Little Hands and Perfect Feet Forever - We can't stop your little angel from growing taller, but we can help you create a memory of their adorable handprint and imprint to be cherished for a lifetime. Remember her perfect feet There is nothing sweeter than tiny perfect baby hands and feet.
